---
title: Erratum to "Application of non-linear time-alignment and integration methods to environmental time series" [Trends
  Anal. Chem. 28 (2009) 373-391] (DOI:10.1016/j.trac.2008.11.013)
date: '2009-01-01'
author:
- K. Ropkins
- D.C. Carslaw
- P.S. Goodman
- J.E. Tate
categories:
- Journal Article
publication: '*TrAC - Trends in Analytical Chemistry*'
---

## Erratum to "Application of non-linear time-alignment and integration methods to environmental time series" [Trends Anal. Chem. 28 (2009) 373-391] (DOI:10.1016/j.trac.2008.11.013)

<p class="pub-meta">K. Ropkins, D.C. Carslaw, P.S. Goodman, J.E. Tate</p>

_*TrAC - Trends in Analytical Chemistry*_, 2009


<div class="pub-links">
<a href="carslaw-2009-a.bib" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm"><i class="bi bi-download"></i> BibTeX</a>
</div>
